user.title: Add Appliance
user.description: Set up Wattson to monitor an appliance's power consumption.

source_entity.title: Power Source
source_entity.description: Select the power sensor entity to monitor.

source_mqtt.title: MQTT Power Source
source_mqtt.description: Enter the MQTT topic that publishes power readings.

abort.already_configured: This power source is already configured.

init.title: Wattson Options
init.description: Adjust detection thresholds. End Delay controls how long to wait at zero power before declaring a cycle finished — set to 0 for automatic (recommended).
